step_rationale: HLA-B is an oxidative stress-linked CAD causal target modulating immune activation in plaque.
mechanism: HLA-B is a causal target for oxidative stress-linked CAD, influencing immune-cell recruitment and plaque inflammation.

references.title: Oxidative Stress-Related Genome-Wide Mendelian Randomization Identifies Causal Genes for Coronary Artery Disease.
